# spawnly_agent_template (Data Source)

Look up a single agent template in the Spawnly registry by its agent type.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_type` (String) Unique agent type identifier to look up.

### Read-Only

- `authz_template` (Block, Read-only) SpiceDB relations written when an agent of this type registers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--authz_template))
- `delegation` (Block, Read-only) What child types this type may spawn, and how those spawns are gated. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--delegation))
- `meta` (Block, Read-only) Human-facing metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--meta))
- `oauth_scopes` (List of String) OAuth2 scopes this agent type requests at runtime.
- `requires_tenant` (Boolean) When true, the orchestrator rejects a tenant-less spawn of this type.
- `runtime_spec` (Block, Read-only) How the agent pod is built and run. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--runtime_spec))
- `status` (String) Template status: `active` (spawnable) or `disabled` (hidden, unspawnable).
- `version` (String) Template version string (opaque to the registry).

<a id="nestedblock--authz_template"></a>
### Nested Schema for `authz_template`

Read-Only:

- `spicedb_relation` (Block List) One SpiceDB relationship template. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--authz_template--spicedb_relation))

<a id="nestedblock--authz_template--spicedb_relation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `authz_template.spicedb_relation`

Read-Only:

- `relation` (String) Relation, e.g. `agent`.
- `resource` (String) Resource, e.g. `tenant:{{tenant_id}}`.
- `subject` (String) Subject, e.g. `agent:{{agent_id}}`.



<a id="nestedblock--delegation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `delegation`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_child_types` (List of String) Child agent types this type may spawn.
- `child_policies` (Attributes Map) Per-child-type spawn gating, keyed by child agent type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--delegation--child_policies))
- `grantable_scopes` (List of String) Scopes this type may delegate to children.
- `max_depth` (Number) Maximum spawn-chain depth below this type.

<a id="nestedatt--delegation--child_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `delegation.child_policies`

Read-Only:

- `consent_ttl` (String) Go duration string a granted consent lasts.
- `require_user_consent` (Boolean) Gate this child spawn behind CIBA user consent.



<a id="nestedblock--meta"></a>
### Nested Schema for `meta`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Short description of the agent type.
- `display_name` (String) Display name shown in the dashboard.


<a id="nestedblock--runtime_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `runtime_spec`

Read-Only:

- `env_defaults` (Map of String) Default environment variables injected into the agent pod.
- `image` (String) Container image for the agent.
- `lifecycle` (String) `short-lived` or `long-lived`.
- `resources` (Block, Read-only) Pod resource limits. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--runtime_spec--resources))
- `supports_chat` (Boolean) Whether the agent serves the chat endpoint (long-lived only).

<a id="nestedblock--runtime_spec--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `runtime_spec.resources`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_limits` (String) CPU limit (e.g. `500m`).
- `memory_limits` (String) Memory limit (e.g. `256Mi`).
